facts.primaryTitle: They Invited the Midnight Man Inside
facts.setting: The ritual required Daniel to carry a candle until 3:33 a.m.
criticalEvents: The ritual required Daniel to carry a candle until 3:33 a.m.
The first time it went out, something whispered from inside his shadow.
Daniel Cross was a sceptical livestream host when the story began in an abandoned country house used for an online challenge.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
facts.threat: The ritual required Daniel to carry a candle until 3:33 a.m.
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did Daniel Cross defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
